description: TS2564 error analysis — how many would be fixed by optional prop support + HTMLElement skip

summary.estimatedFixableByOptionalMarker: ~600-650 (most optional props in published types have ? marker)
summary.estimatedRemainingAfterBothFixes: ~26-76 (props without ? in published type and without defaults)

methodology: Sampled 3 components (badge, button, input). Cross-referenced TS2564 prop names against published .d.ts types. className/id appear in 85 components = 170 TS2564 errors. Remaining ~676 are overwhelmingly optional (have ? in published type).

badge.note: Badge has only className/id as TS2564 (color has default = 'grey')

button.note: 15 of 17 are optional in published ButtonProps type

input.note: 11 optional + 2 HTMLElement. 4 required without defaults will need separate fix.

conclusion: Combining optional prop support (Task 6) + HTMLElement prop skip (Task 7) should fix ~770-820 of 846 TS2564 errors (91-97%). Remaining ~26-76 are genuinely required props without defaults.
